title: rosa gallica var. flaccida
intro: Rosa gallica var. flaccida, also known as the 'Blanc Double de Coubert' or 'Alba', is a variety of the Gallic rose, a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is known for its fragrant, white flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rosa gallica var. flaccida include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or dried flowers for use in herbal remedies.
